name: Sahathai Terminal Public Company Limited
summary: Sahathai Terminal Public Company Limited engages in the shipping and logistics businesses in Thailand. The company offers coastal port, coastal port arrangement consultancy, tug boat, inland transport, and related merchant marine services. It also provides on-site container inspection, cleaning, maintenance, repair, and upgradation services; multipurpose terminal services, such as bulk and project cargo, and coastal shipping; warehousing services; and value added logistics services inside the port. Sahathai Terminal Public Company Limited was founded in 2007 and is based in Samut Prakan, Thailand.
